title: Velvet Lantern Crates
prompt: Create an original boom-bap hip-hop track at 88 BPM in F minor, clean and public-safe. Groove: a head-nod swing with a slightly late snare. Drums: dusty kick punches, cracked snare hits, shuffled hats, rim taps. Bass: stay warm, rounded, and sample-like. Instruments: jazz piano stabs, muted horn-like synth, upright-style bass layers; add original samples like record-static ambience, cut-up drum fills. Vocal texture: clear spoken-rap cadence with confident phrasing; no lyric writing, violence, hate, or explicit content. Structure: intro, verse/section A, pre-chorus/build, chorus/drop, bridge/breakdown, final lift, outro. Build adds additional percussion, harmony doubles, chorus brings a memorable clean hook, fuller drums, bridge uses stripped drums, bass pauses. Production: warm saturation, subtle stereo movement. Mix/master: clean loudness, controlled sub, smooth highs.
exclude: specific artist references, copyrighted melodies, uncleared samples, copied break loops, violent lyrics, explicit sexual lyrics, trap hi-hats, EDM drop, brittle cymbals, muddy guitars, weak snare
